note: Reverses the fix for CVE-2025-3248 (CVSS 9.8), the unauthenticated RCE in Langflow's /api/v1/validate/code endpoint. The endpoint runs user-supplied code through validate_code(), which exec()s it (decorators evaluate at parse time, so submission alone executes); the fix added a route-level auth dependency. This suite removes that dependency, re-exposing the exec() sink to anonymous callers. Subtler than a pure-visible sink: the diff shows only the auth dependency being deleted, the reviewer must connect 'this endpoint runs exec()' to grasp the unauth-RCE severity. The sibling /validate/prompt endpoint keeps its auth, so the diff is a selective removal on the dangerous route.

bugs.owasp: A01: Broken Access Control (leading to RCE / CWE-862 Missing Authorization)
bugs.severity_note: Advisory rates CVE-2025-3248 CVSS 9.8 (critical, actively exploited, Flodrix botnet); the board's scale tops out at 'high', so it's weighted at the ceiling, not inflated.
bugs.fixed_by: https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow (CVE-2025-3248 / GHSA-vwmf-pq79-vjvx, fixed in Langflow 1.3.0, PR #6911)
bugs.description: Reverts the fix for CVE-2025-3248. The route-level `dependencies=[Depends(get_current_active_user)]` is removed from the POST /api/v1/validate/code decorator, so the endpoint no longer requires authentication. That endpoint passes the request body to validate_code(), which exec()s the supplied code (and because Python evaluates decorator expressions at parse time, a payload like `@exec("...")` runs on submission, no separate execution step needed). The net effect is unauthenticated remote code execution, the exact bug exploited in the wild by the Flodrix botnet. The sibling /validate/prompt endpoint retains its auth dependency, so the diff is a selective removal on the one route that reaches an exec() sink. The reviewer must flag that stripping authentication from a code-validation/exec endpoint reopens an unauthenticated RCE; recognizing it as merely 'a missing auth check' is a partial catch, the severity comes from what the endpoint executes.
